metadata.significance: Describes three groups of people on Judgment Day and their different fates

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ

translations.en_sahih: When the Occurrence occurs,
translations.en_yusufali: When the Event inevitable cometh to pass,
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila berlaku hari kiamat itu,

translations.en_sahih: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
translations.en_yusufali: Then will no (soul) entertain falsehood concerning its coming.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiada sesiapapun yang dapat mendustakan kejadiannya.

translations.en_sahih: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].
translations.en_yusufali: (Many) will it bring low; (many) will it exalt;
translations.ms_basmeih: Kejadian hari kiamat itu merendahkan (golongan yang ingkar), dan meninggikan (golongan yang taat).

translations.en_sahih: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
translations.en_yusufali: When the earth shall be shaken to its depths,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ia berlaku) semasa bumi bergoncang dengan sebebar-benar goncangan.

translations.en_sahih: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
translations.en_yusufali: And the mountains shall be crumbled to atoms,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan gunung-ganang dihancur leburkan dengan selebur-leburnya,

translations.en_sahih: And become dust dispersing.
translations.en_yusufali: Becoming dust scattered abroad,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu menjadilah ia debu yang bertebaran,

translations.en_sahih: And you become [of] three kinds:
translations.en_yusufali: And ye shall be sorted out into three classes.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu pula menjadi tiga puak (yang berlainan keadaannya);

translations.en_sahih: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
translations.en_yusufali: Then (there will be) the Companions of the Right Hand;- What will be the Companions of the Right Hand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu puak pihak kanan; alangkah bahagianya keadaan puak pihak kanan itu?

translations.en_sahih: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
translations.en_yusufali: And the Companions of the Left Hand,- what will be the Companions of the Left Hand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan puak pihak kiri; - alangkah seksanya keadaan puak pihak kiri itu?

translations.en_sahih: And the forerunners, the forerunners -
translations.en_yusufali: And those Foremost (in Faith) will be Foremost (in the Hereafter).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (puak yang ketiga pula ialah) orang-orang yang telah mendahului (dalam mengerjakan kebaikan di dunia), - yang akan mendahului (mencapai balasan yang sebaik-baiknya di akhirat kelak);

translations.en_sahih: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
translations.en_yusufali: These will be those Nearest to Allah:
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itulah orang-orang yang didampingkan (di sisi Allah),

translations.en_sahih: In the Gardens of Pleasure,
translations.en_yusufali: In Gardens of Bliss:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tinggal menetap) di dalam Syurga-syurga yang penuh nikmat.

translations.en_sahih: A [large] company of the former peoples
translations.en_yusufali: A number of people from those of old,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Di antaranya) sekumpulan besar dari umat-umat manusia yang terdahulu;

translations.en_sahih: And a few of the later peoples,
translations.en_yusufali: And a few from those of later times.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebilangan kecil dari orang-orang yang datang kemudian.

translations.en_sahih: On thrones woven [with ornament],
translations.en_yusufali: (They will be) on Thrones encrusted (with gold and precious stones),
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka duduk di dalam Syurga itu) di atas takhta-takhta kebesaran yang bertatahkan permata;

translations.en_sahih: Reclining on them, facing each other.
translations.en_yusufali: Reclining on them, facing each other.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sambil berbaring di atasnya dengan berhadap-hadapan.

translations.en_sahih: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
translations.en_yusufali: Round about them will (serve) youths of perpetual (freshness),
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka dilayani oleh anak-anak muda lelaki yang tetap kekal (dalam keadaan mudanya), yang sentiasa beredar di sekitar mereka, -

translations.en_sahih: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -
translations.en_yusufali: With goblets, (shining) beakers, and cups (filled) out of clear-flowing fountains:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan membawa piala-piala minuman dan tekoh-tekoh serta piala atau gelas yang berisi arak (yang diambil) dari sungainya yang mengalir.

translations.en_sahih: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -
translations.en_yusufali: No after-ache will they receive therefrom, nor will they suffer intoxication:
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak merasa pening kepala dan tidak pula mabuk dengan sebab menikmatinya.

translations.en_sahih: And fruit of what they select
translations.en_yusufali: And with fruits, any that they may select:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga (dibawakan kepada mereka) buah-buahan dari jenis-jenis yang mereka pilih,

translations.en_sahih: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
translations.en_yusufali: And the flesh of fowls, any that they may desire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta daging burung dari jenis-jenis yang mereka ingini.

translations.en_sahih: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
translations.en_yusufali: And (there will be) Companions with beautiful, big, and lustrous eyes,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (mereka dilayani) bidadari-bidadari yang cantik parasnya,

translations.en_sahih: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,
translations.en_yusufali: Like unto Pearls well-guarded.
translations.ms_basmeih: Seperti mutiara yang tersimpan dengan sebaik-baiknya.

translations.en_sahih: As reward for what they used to do.
translations.en_yusufali: A Reward for the deeds of their past (life).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Semuanya itu) sebagai balasan bagi (amal-amal baik) yang mereka telah kerjakan.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
ayahs.transliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala tatheeman

translations.en_sahih: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
translations.en_yusufali: Not frivolity will they hear therein, nor any taint of ill,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak akan mendengar dalam Syurga itu perkataan yang sia-sia dan tiada pula sesuatu yang menyebabkan dosa; -

translations.en_sahih: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."
translations.en_yusufali: Only the saying, "Peace! Peace".
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka hanya mendengar ucapan: " Selamat! Selamat! " (dari satu kepada yang lain).

translations.en_sahih: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
translations.en_yusufali: The Companions of the Right Hand,- what will be the Companions of the Right Hand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan puak kanan, - alangkah bahagianya keadaan puak kanan itu?

translations.en_sahih: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
translations.en_yusufali: (They will be) among Lote-trees without thorns,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka bersenang-lenang di antara pohon-pohon bidara yang tidak berduri.

translations.en_sahih: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
translations.en_yusufali: Among Talh trees with flowers (or fruits) piled one above another,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan pokok-pokok pisang yang tersusun rapi buahnya,

translations.en_sahih: And shade extended
translations.en_yusufali: In shade long-extended,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan naungan yang tetap terbentang,

translations.en_sahih: And water poured out
translations.en_yusufali: By water flowing constantly,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan air yang sentiasa mengalir,

translations.en_sahih: And fruit, abundant [and varied],
translations.en_yusufali: And fruit in abundance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta buah-buahan yang banyak,

translations.en_sahih: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,
translations.en_yusufali: Whose season is not limited, nor (supply) forbidden,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tidak putus-putus dan tidak pula terlarang mendapatnya,

translations.en_sahih: And [upon] beds raised high.
translations.en_yusufali: And on Thrones (of Dignity), raised high.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tempat-tempat tidur yang tertinggi keadaannya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
translations.en_yusufali: We have created (their Companions) of special creation.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan isteri-isteri mereka dengan ciptaan istimewa,

translations.en_sahih: And made them virgins,
translations.en_yusufali: And made them virgin - pure (and undefiled), -
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta Kami jadikan mereka sentiasa dara (yang tidak pernah disentuh),

translations.en_sahih: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,
translations.en_yusufali: Beloved (by nature), equal in age,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tetap mencintai jodohnya, serta yang sebaya umurnya.

translations.en_sahih: For the companions of the right [who are]
translations.en_yusufali: For the Companions of the Right Hand.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Semuanya itu disediakan) bagi puak kanan;

translations.en_sahih: A company of the former peoples
translations.en_yusufali: A (goodly) number from those of old,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu sebilangan besar dari orang-orang yang terdahulu,

translations.en_sahih: And a company of the later peoples.
translations.en_yusufali: And a (goodly) number from those of later times.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebilangan besar dari orang-orang yang datang kemudian.

translations.en_sahih: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
translations.en_yusufali: The Companions of the Left Hand,- what will be the Companions of the Left Hand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan puak kiri, - alangkah seksanya keadaan puak kiri itu?

translations.en_sahih: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
translations.en_yusufali: (They will be) in the midst of a Fierce Blast of Fire and in Boiling Water,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka diseksa dalam angin yang membakar dan air yang menggelegak

translations.en_sahih: And a shade of black smoke,
translations.en_yusufali: And in the shades of Black Smoke:
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta naungan dari asap hitam,

translations.en_sahih: Neither cool nor beneficial.
translations.en_yusufali: Nothing (will there be) to refresh, nor to please:
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tidak sejuk, dan tidak pula memberi kesenangan.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
translations.en_yusufali: For that they were wont to be indulged, before that, in wealth (and luxury),
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya mereka sebelum itu dilalaikan oleh kemewahan (dunia, dari mengingati hukum Tuhan).

translations.en_sahih: And they used to persist in the great violation,
translations.en_yusufali: And persisted obstinately in wickedness supreme!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka pula sentiasa melakukan dosa yang besar,

ayahs.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakanoo yaqooloona aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona

translations.en_sahih: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
translations.en_yusufali: And they used to say, "What! when we die and become dust and bones, shall we then indeed be raised up again?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga mereka selalu berkata: "Adakah sesudah kita mati serta menjadi tanah dan tulang, betulkah kita akan dibangkitkan hidup semula?

translations.en_sahih: And our forefathers [as well]?"
translations.en_yusufali: "(We) and our fathers of old?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan adakah juga datuk nenek kita yang telah lalu, (akan dibangkitkan hidup semula)? "

translations.en_sahih: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Yea, those of old and those of later times,
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (kepada mereka): "Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang telah lalu dan orang-orang yang terkemudian,

translations.en_sahih: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
translations.en_yusufali: "All will certainly be gathered together for the meeting appointed for a Day well-known.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tetap akan dihimpunkan pada masa yang ditentukan - pada hari kiamat yang termaklum.

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
translations.en_yusufali: "Then will ye truly,- O ye that go wrong, and treat (Truth) as Falsehood!-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian, sesungguhnya kamu wahai orang-orang yang sesat yang mendustakan (kedatangan hari kiamat),

translations.en_sahih: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
translations.en_yusufali: "Ye will surely taste of the Tree of Zaqqum.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tetap akan memakan (pada hari itu) dari sebatang pokok, iaitu pokok zaqqum,

translations.en_sahih: And filling with it your bellies
translations.en_yusufali: "Then will ye fill your insides therewith,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka kamu akan memenuhi perut kamu dari pokok (yang pahit buahnya) itu,

translations.en_sahih: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
translations.en_yusufali: "And drink Boiling Water on top of it:
translations.ms_basmeih: "Selepas itu kamu akan meminum pula dari air panas yang menggelegak,

translations.en_sahih: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.
translations.en_yusufali: "Indeed ye shall drink like diseased camels raging with thirst!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Iaitu kamu akan minum seperti unta yang berpenyakit sentiasa dahaga dan tidak puas-puas".

translations.en_sahih: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.
translations.en_yusufali: Such will be their entertainment on the Day of Requital!
translations.ms_basmeih: Inilah (jenis-jenis azab) yang disediakan untuk menyambut mereka pada hari Pembalasan itu.

translations.en_sahih: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
translations.en_yusufali: It is We Who have created you: why will ye not witness the Truth?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamilah yang telah menciptakan kamu (dari tiada kepada ada - wahai golongan yang ingkar), maka ada baiknya kalau kamu percaya (akan kebangkitan kamu hidup semula pada hari kiamat).

translations.en_sahih: Have you seen that which you emit?
translations.en_yusufali: Do ye then see?- The (human Seed) that ye throw out,-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mengapa kamu masih berdegil?) Tidakkah kamu memikirkan keadaan air mani yang kamu pancarkan (ke dalam rahim)?

translations.en_sahih: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
translations.en_yusufali: Is it ye who create it, or are We the Creators?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah kamu yang menciptakannya atau Kami yang menciptakannya?

ayahs.arabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu qaddarna baynakumu almawta wama nahnu bimasbooqeena

translations.en_sahih: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
translations.en_yusufali: We have decreed Death to be your common lot, and We are not to be frustrated
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamilah yang menentukan (dan menetapkan masa) kematian (tiap-tiap seorang) di antara kamu, dan Kami tidak sekali-kali dapat dikalahkan atau dilemahkan;

ayahs.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAala an nubaddila amthalakum wanunshiakum fee ma la taAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
translations.en_yusufali: from changing your Forms and creating you (again) in (forms) that ye know not.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bahkan Kami berkuasa) menggantikan (kamu dengan) orang-orang yang serupa kamu (tetapi tidak seperti bawaan kamu), dan berkuasa menciptakan kamu dalam bentuk kejadian yang kamu tidak mengetahuinya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad AAalimtumu alnnashata aloola falawla tathakkaroona

translations.en_sahih: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And ye certainly know already the first form of creation: why then do ye not celebrate His praises?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, kamu telah sedia mengetahui tentang ciptaan diri kamu kali pertama, maka ada baiknya kalau kamu mengambil ingatan (bahawa Allah yang telah menciptakan kamu dari tiada kepada ada, berkuasa membangkitkan kamu hidup semula pada hari akhirat kelak).

translations.en_sahih: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
translations.en_yusufali: See ye the seed that ye sow in the ground?
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (mengapa kamu masih berdegil?) Tidakkah kamu melihat apa yang kamu tanam?

translations.en_sahih: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
translations.en_yusufali: Is it ye that cause it to grow, or are We the Cause?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamukah yang menumbuhkannya atau Kami yang menumbuhkannya?

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law nashao lajaAAalnahu hutaman fathaltum tafakkahoona

translations.en_sahih: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
translations.en_yusufali: Were it Our Will, We could crumble it to dry powder, and ye would be left in wonderment,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalau Kami kehendaki, sudah tentu Kami akan jadikan tanaman itu kering hancur (sebelum ia berbuah), maka dengan itu tinggalah kamu dalam keadaan hairan dan menyesal,

translations.en_sahih: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;
translations.en_yusufali: (Saying), "We are indeed left with debts (for nothing):
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sambil berkata): "Sesungguhnya kami menanggung kerugian.

translations.en_sahih: Rather, we have been deprived."
translations.en_yusufali: "Indeed are we shut out (of the fruits of our labour)"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Bahkan kami hampa (dari mendapat sebarang hasil) "

translations.en_sahih: And have you seen the water that you drink?
translations.en_yusufali: See ye the water which ye drink?
translations.ms_basmeih: Selain dari itu, tidakkah kamu melihat air yang kamu minum?

ayahs.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Aantum anzaltumoohu mina almuzni am nahnu almunziloona

translations.en_sahih: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
translations.en_yusufali: Do ye bring it down (in rain) from the cloud or do We?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamukah yang menurunkannya dari awan (sebagai hujan), atau Kami yang menurunkannya?

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law nashao jaAAalnahu ojajan falawla tashkuroona

translations.en_sahih: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
translations.en_yusufali: Were it Our Will, We could make it salt (and unpalatable): then why do ye not give thanks?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalau Kami kehendaki, Kami akan jadikan dia masin, maka ada baiknya kalau kamu bersyukur.

translations.en_sahih: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
translations.en_yusufali: See ye the Fire which ye kindle?
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya, tidakkah kamu melihat api yang kamu nyalakan (dengan cara digesek)?

ayahs.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Aantum anshatum shajarataha am nahnu almunshioona

translations.en_sahih: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
translations.en_yusufali: Is it ye who grow the tree which feeds the fire, or do We grow it?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamukah yang menumbuhkan pokok kayunya, atau Kami yang menumbuhkannya?

translations.en_sahih: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
translations.en_yusufali: We have made it a memorial (of Our handiwork), and an article of comfort and convenience for the denizens of deserts.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami jadikan api (yang tercetus dari kayu basah) itu sebagai peringatan (bagi orang-orang yang lalaikan kebenaran hari akhirat) dan sebagai benda yang memberi kesenangan kepada orang-orang musafir.

translations.en_sahih: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
translations.en_yusufali: Then celebrate with praises the name of thy Lord, the Supreme!
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh yang demikian - (wahai orang yang lalai) - bertasbihlah dengan memuji nama Tuhanmu Yang Maha Besar (sebagai bersyukur akan nikmat-nikmatNya itu).

translations.en_sahih: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,
translations.en_yusufali: Furthermore I call to witness the setting of the Stars,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Aku bersumpah: Demi tempat-tempat dan masa-masa turunnya bahagian-bahagian Al-Quran, -

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.
translations.en_yusufali: And that is indeed a mighty adjuration if ye but knew,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebenarnya sumpah itu adalah sumpah yang besar, kalaulah kamu mengetahuinya, -

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an
translations.en_yusufali: That this is indeed a qur'an Most Honourable,
translations.ms_basmeih: Bahawa sesungguhnya (yang dibacakan kepada kamu) itu ialah Al-Quran yang mulia, (yang sentiasa memberi ajaran dan pimpinan),

translations.en_sahih: In a Register well-protected;
translations.en_yusufali: In Book well-guarded,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tersimpan dalam Kitab yang cukup terpelihara,

translations.en_sahih: None touch it except the purified.
translations.en_yusufali: Which none shall touch but those who are clean:
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tidak disentuh melainkan oleh makhluk-makhluk yang diakui bersih suci;

translations.en_sahih: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: A Revelation from the Lord of the Worlds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Al-Quran itu diturunkan dari Allah Tuhan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
translations.en_yusufali: Is it such a Message that ye would hold in light esteem?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah kamu (wahai golongan yang kufur ingkar) bersikap sambilewa terhadap keterangan-keterangan Al-Quran ini?

translations.en_sahih: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
translations.en_yusufali: And have ye made it your livelihood that ye should declare it false?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu jadikan sikap kamu mendustakannya (sebagai ganti) bahagian dan nasib kamu (menerima dan bersyukur akan ajarannya)?

translations.en_sahih: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
translations.en_yusufali: Then why do ye not (intervene) when (the soul of the dying man) reaches the throat,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka alangkah eloknya kalau semasa (roh seseorang dari kamu yang hampir mati) sampai ke kerongkongnya, -

translations.en_sahih: And you are at that time looking on -
translations.en_yusufali: And ye the while (sit) looking on,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang kamu pada masa itu (berada di sekelilingnya) menyaksikan keadaannya, -

ayahs.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi minkum walakin la tubsiroona

translations.en_sahih: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
translations.en_yusufali: But We are nearer to him than ye, and yet see not,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami lebih dekat kepadanya daripada kamu, tetapi kamu tidak melihat,

translations.en_sahih: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
translations.en_yusufali: Then why do ye not,- If you are exempt from (future) account,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka bukankah elok kalau kamu orang-orang yang tidak dikuasai (dan tidak tunduk kepada kekuasaan Kami), -

translations.en_sahih: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
translations.en_yusufali: Call back the soul, if ye are true (in the claim of independence)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Kamu kembalikan roh itu (kepada keadaan sebelumnya) jika betul kamu orang-orang yang benar ?

translations.en_sahih: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
translations.en_yusufali: Thus, then, if he be of those Nearest to Allah,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kesudahannya: jika ia (yang mati itu) dari orang-orang " Muqarrabiin ",

translations.en_sahih: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.
translations.en_yusufali: (There is for him) Rest and Satisfaction, and a Garden of Delights.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (ia akan beroleh) rehat kesenangan, dan rahmat kesegaran, serta Syurga kenikmatan.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma in kana min ashabi alyameeni

translations.en_sahih: And if he was of the companions of the right,
translations.en_yusufali: And if he be of the Companions of the Right Hand,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan jika ia dari puak kanan,

translations.en_sahih: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."
translations.en_yusufali: (For him is the salutation), "Peace be unto thee", from the Companions of the Right Hand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (akan dikatakan kepadanya):" Selamat sejahtera kepadamu, (kerana engkau) dari puak kanan".

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma in kana mina almukaththibeena alddalleena

translations.en_sahih: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
translations.en_yusufali: And if he be of those who treat (Truth) as Falsehood, who go wrong,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan jika ia dari (puak kiri) yang mendustakan (Rasulnya), lagi sesat,

translations.en_sahih: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
translations.en_yusufali: For him is Entertainment with Boiling Water.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sambutan yang disediakan baginya adalah dari air panas yang menggelegak,

translations.en_sahih: And burning in Hellfire
translations.en_yusufali: And burning in Hell-Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta bakaran api neraka.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, this is the true certainty,
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, this is the Very Truth and Certainly.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya (segala yang disebutkan) itu adalah kebenaran yang diyakini.

translations.en_sahih: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
translations.en_yusufali: So celebrate with praises the name of thy Lord, the Supreme.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, bertasbihlah dengan memuji nama Tuhanmu Yang Maha Besar.
